content: PIX static QR (BR Code EMV) can include campo 54 (Transaction Amount) as optional field. When populated, all Brazilian banking apps (Nubank, Itau, BB, Caixa, Inter, PagBank) enforce the exact amount—payer cannot modify it. Dynamic PIX requires BACEN-registered PSP, HTTPS endpoint, digital certificate, and is out of scope for zero-cost MVP. CRC-16 CCITT polynomial 0x1021 initial value 0xFFFF is mandatory—wrong CRC parameters cause silent rejection by bank apps.
